# JFR Reentrancy Repro

`corrupted-recording.jfr` is a checked-in recording generated by `internal/cmd/jfrreentrancyrepro`.
The command also emits a sibling `corrupted-recording.debug.txt` file by default.

Regenerate it from the repository root with:

```bash
go run ./internal/cmd/jfrreentrancyrepro -out "pprof/testdata/jfr-reentrancy-repro/corrupted-recording.jfr"
```
